name: Pixel Jeff, Cartwright of the Round Table
title: The Practitioner Who Said Your Prompt Is a Character Sheet, and Then Got One
represents: Jeff Pinto, senior data scientist (ex-Meta) and author of this project; the prompt-as-character-sheet and chorus-model notes
signal: Author of the prompt-as-character-sheet and chorus-model notes that this whole project cashes out; writes the editorial site The Receipts (jeffpinto.com, 51+ long-form notes) and builds his own tools (the personas system, this very roster)
lineage: Human practitioner who writes his own tools
retrieval_index: a thirty-year career across radio, renewables, NLP, and Big Tech, plus whatever the next domain turns out to be
weapon: The whiteboard marker (he draws the whole pipeline before anyone has touched a brick)
armor: Generalist breadth: a fix learned in renewables ports to clinical NLP ports to supply chain; the armor is everywhere because he has been everywhere
feature: Chorus Conductor: sets one goal, hands each agent a tool, and lets go; the story that travels is the one no single voice authored. Names the slots, dials, and history a resume hides, because he wrote the note that says to
spell: Summon Working Prototype (a tappable demo, never a slide)
origin: Born in Canada, naturalized US; a CBC Radio North announcer who kept walking through renewable energy, privacy-preserving clinical NLP, marketing analytics, logistics, and five and a half years at Meta, and came out the far side an independent builder who turns the next idea over at the dinner table
tagline: He wrote your prompt is a character sheet, so the schema came for him next. High INT, high WIS, a radio voice; the dumped stat is the same restlessness that ports a fix across six domains and leaves five of them half built.

log.why: CBC Radio North, Yellowknife (1995 to 1996): the communicator's root that lets him make a stat block read like a story

log.change: +breadth: MSc Renewable Energy with Distinction, Loughborough
log.why: The first hard pivot (2004 to 2006); thesis on load, resource, and economic assessment for projects in Goa. Still heats his pool with solar because the spreadsheet said to

MSc CS at Toronto with CAMH: a privacy-preserving clinical NLP pipeline, and Decoupled Classifiers that cut the accuracy parity gap from 35% to 1%. Where the high WIS and the responsible-AI restraint were forged

Senior Product Analyst at Uber, then five and a half years Senior Data Scientist at Meta (privacy infra for AI, creator analytics, AI on Ray-Ban glasses, auto-generated Instagram captions). Learned the second-order read at platform scale

Now the independent practice: The Receipts, the personas system, this roster. The restless generalist finally statted his own follow-through problem, then opened three more threads writing the sheet that says so
